REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-03-2003 - MATTER ON CALENDAR FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THIS MATTER SETTLES AS MORE FULLY REFLECTED IN THE OFFICIAL NOTES OF THE COURT REPORTER AND MORE BRIEFLY, AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF, JOSEPHINE EXON AND AGAINST DEFENDANT, KEITH ROGERS. RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 183 LEXINGTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $6,500 DUE FOR BACK RENT BETWEEN FEBRUARY 2003 AND JULY 2003. DAMAGES TO BE PAID AT $43.33 PER DAY FROM JULY 11, 2003. $6,000 IS DUE BY SEPTEMBER 15, 2003. ALL RENT TO BE PAID BY THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH. COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. THE TRIAL DATES IS HEREBY ORDERED VACATED.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXON, JOSEPHINE AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, KEITH DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EXON, JOSEPHINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROGERS, KEITH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 193 LEXINGTON ST., SAN FRANCISO, CA $6,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,500.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DAMAGES OF 43.33 PER DAY FROM JULY 11, 2003. $6000 DUE BY SEPTEMBER 15, 2003. ALL RENT TO BE PAID BY THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH. COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF.
